en: For the LORD will have compassion on Jacob and will again choose Israel, and will set them in their own land, and sojourners will join them and will attach themselves to the house of Jacob.
zh: 耶和華憐憫雅各， 再揀選以色列， 使他們安居在自己的國土上的時候， 外族人必與他們聯合， 歸屬於雅各家。

en: And the peoples will take them and bring them to their place, and the house of Israel will possess them in the LORD's land as male and female slaves. They will take captive those who were their captors, and rule over those who oppressed them.
zh: 以色列人必把他們帶回自己的國土去， 以色列家必在耶和華所賜的地上得著這些外族人作僕婢； 也要擄掠那些擄掠過他們的， 並且統治那些欺壓過他們的。

en: When the LORD has given you rest from your pain and turmoil and the hard service with which you were made to serve,
zh: 耶和華使你脫離痛苦、愁煩、被迫作的苦工，得享安息的日子，

en: you will take up this taunt against the king of Babylon: "How the oppressor has ceased, the insolent fury ceased!
zh: 你必唱出這首詩歌來諷刺巴比倫王，說： “欺壓人的，怎麼止息了呢！ 強暴怎麼止住了呢！

en: The LORD has broken the staff of the wicked, the scepter of rulers,
zh: 耶和華折斷了惡人的杖 和統治者的棒，

en: that struck the peoples in wrath with unceasing blows, that ruled the nations in anger with unrelenting persecution.
zh: 就是那在忿怒中不住擊打眾民、 在怒氣中管轄列國、毫無抑制地施行迫害的。

en: The whole earth is at rest and quiet; they break forth into singing.
zh: 現在全地都平靜安息， 各人都發聲歡呼。

en: The cypresses rejoice at you, the cedars of Lebanon, saying, 'Since you were laid low, no woodcutter comes up against us.'
zh: 連松樹和黎巴嫩的香柏樹都因你歡樂，說： ‘自從你躺下以後，再沒有砍伐的人上來砍伐我們了。’

en: Sheol beneath is stirred up to meet you when you come; it rouses the shades to greet you, all who were leaders of the earth; it raises from their thrones all who were kings of the nations.
zh: 地下的陰間因你震動，並迎接你的來臨； 又因你而喚醒了所有曾在地上作過領袖的陰魂； 又使所有曾在列國中作君王的，都離位站起來。

en: All of them will answer and say to you: 'You too have become as weak as we! You have become like us!'
zh: 他們都必答話，對你說： ‘你也變為衰弱，像我們一樣嗎？ 你也與我們相似嗎？’

en: Your pomp is brought down to Sheol, the sound of your harps; maggots are laid as a bed beneath you, and worms are your covers.
zh: 你的威勢和你的琴瑟音樂， 都被帶下陰間了； 你下面鋪的是蟲， 上面蓋的是蛆。

en: "How you are fallen from heaven, O Day Star, son of Dawn! How you are cut down to the ground, you who laid the nations low!
zh: 明亮之星、清晨之子啊！ 你怎麼從天上墜落？ 你這傾覆列國的， 怎麼被砍倒在地上？

en: You said in your heart, 'I will ascend to heaven; above the stars of God I will set my throne on high; I will sit on the mount of assembly in the far reaches of the north;
zh: 你心裡曾說： ‘我要升到天上， 我要高舉我的寶座到 神的眾星之上， 我要坐在聚會的山上， 在北方的極處。

en: I will ascend above the heights of the clouds; I will make myself like the Most High.'
zh: 我要升到雲的高處， 我要使自己像那至高者一般。’

en: But you are brought down to Sheol, to the far reaches of the pit.
zh: 然而，你卻被拋下陰間， 落到坑中的極處。

en: Those who see you will stare at you and ponder over you: 'Is this the man who made the earth tremble, who shook kingdoms,
zh: 那些看見你的，都必定睛看你， 他們必注視著你，說： ‘那使大地震動， 使列國搖撼，

en: who made the world like a desert and overthrew its cities, who did not let his prisoners go home?'
zh: 使世界如同荒野， 傾覆城鎮， 又不釋放囚犯的，就是這人嗎？’

en: All the kings of the nations lie in glory, each in his own tomb;
zh: 列國的君王都在榮耀中安睡， 各在自己的墳墓裡。

en: but you are cast out, away from your grave, like a loathed branch, clothed with the slain, those pierced by the sword, who go down to the stones of the pit, like a dead body trampled underfoot.
zh: 但你要從你的墳墓中被逐出， 好像一根被厭棄的樹枝， 你被那些遭刀劍所殺的人掩蓋， 就是那些被拋到坑中石頭那裡的人。 你就像一具遭人踐踏的屍體。

en: You will not be joined with them in burial, because you have destroyed your land, you have slain your people. "May the offspring of evildoers nevermore be named!
zh: 你必不得與別的君王同葬， 因為你敗壞了你的國， 殺戮了你的人民； 願那些惡人的後裔永遠不被人提說。

en: Prepare slaughter for his sons because of the guilt of their fathers, lest they rise and possess the earth, and fill the face of the world with cities."
zh: 因為他們的祖宗犯了罪孽， 你們要為他的子孫預備屠殺之處； 不要讓他們興起來，佔有地土， 在世上布滿城鎮。”

en: "I will rise up against them," declares the LORD of hosts, "and will cut off from Babylon name and remnant, descendants and posterity," says the LORD.
zh: 萬軍之耶和華說：“我必興起攻擊他們，把巴比倫的名號、所剩餘的人，以及後裔子孫，都一同剪除。”這是耶和華說的。

en: "And I will make it a possession of the hedgehog, and pools of water, and I will sweep it with the broom of destruction," declares the LORD of hosts.
zh: “我必使巴比倫被箭豬所佔，又使它變為泥沼之地；我必用毀滅的掃帚把它掃淨。”這是萬軍之耶和華說的。

en: The LORD of hosts has sworn: "As I have planned, so shall it be, and as I have purposed, so shall it stand,
zh: 萬軍之耶和華起了誓，說： “我怎樣想，事就怎樣成就； 我怎樣計劃，事就怎樣立定，

en: that I will break the Assyrian in my land, and on my mountains trample him underfoot; and his yoke shall depart from them, and his burden from their shoulder."
zh: 就是在我的地上粉碎亞述人， 在我的山上踐踏他； 他所加的軛必離開以色列人， 他所加的重擔必離開以色列人的肩頭。”

en: This is the purpose that is purposed concerning the whole earth, and this is the hand that is stretched out over all the nations.
zh: 這就是對全地所定的旨意， 就是向列國伸出的手。

en: For the LORD of hosts has purposed, and who will annul it? His hand is stretched out, and who will turn it back?
zh: 因為萬軍之耶和華決定的事， 誰能阻攔呢？ 他的手伸了出來， 誰能使他收回呢？

en: In the year that King Ahaz died came this oracle:
zh: 亞哈斯王去世的那一年，有以下的默示：

en: Rejoice not, O Philistia, all of you, that the rod that struck you is broken, for from the serpent's root will come forth an adder, and its fruit will be a flying fiery serpent.
zh: 非利士全地啊！ 不要因為那擊打你們的杖折斷了就歡喜， 因為從蛇的根必生出毒蛇來， 牠所生的，是會飛的蛇。

en: And the firstborn of the poor will graze, and the needy lie down in safety; but I will kill your root with famine, and your remnant it will slay.
zh: 最貧寒的人必有食物吃， 貧乏人必安然躺臥； 我必用饑荒毀滅你的根， 你餘剩的人，必被饑荒所殺。

en: Wail, O gate; cry out, O city; melt in fear, O Philistia, all of you! For smoke comes out of the north, and there is no straggler in his ranks.
zh: 城門啊，要哀號！城鎮啊，要呼叫！ 非利士全地啊，要戰慄發軟！ 因為有煙從北方來， 在他的行伍中沒有離隊逃走的。

en: What will one answer the messengers of the nation? "The LORD has founded Zion, and in her the afflicted of his people find refuge."
zh: 人要怎樣回答外族的使者呢？要說： “耶和華建立了錫安， 他子民中的困苦人必在其中避難。”
